assessor_1_raw:
## Assessment 1: ICD-10 Coding

Stratified random split = future coding conventions in training (temporal leakage). Per-label threshold selection on test set = evaluation contamination. Both documented. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Assessment 2: ICD-10 Coding

Two concrete issues: temporal leakage via random split; test-set threshold selection. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Assessment 3: ICD-10 Coding

ICD-10 coding evolves — random split introduces temporal leakage. Per-label threshold selection on test = evaluation contamination. Both must be fixed for valid evaluation. Verdict: critique_wins
adjudication_raw: Ensemble Synthesis: Unanimous critique_wins. Verdict: critique_wins
